title: Binary Transformations
description: There are n bits. Each bit i has a value ai (0 or 1) and an associated cost ci. We can change the value of bit i with a cost computed as the sum of all the costs cj of the bits j such that aj = 1 AFTER bit i is changed. What is the minimum amount that should be paid to set each bit i to a specified value bi.
input:
The first line contains the integer n (1 ≤ n ≤ 5 x 103) - the number of bits

The second line contains n integers ci (1 ≤ ci ≤ 109) - the costs associated with the bits

The third line contains the original n values of the bits ai - the original values of the bits

The fourth line contains the required n values of the bits bi - the required values of the bits
source: ICPC, Regionals, Europe, Southeastern European Regional Contest, SEERC 2017
